texto: Its just a part of life , just a chapter , just a phase ; it is to be over and it will but i has taught the harsh realities of life. In the end , your support lies in yourself. No one comes to rescue you , you have to gird up your loin against all the odds and you are to raise by your own. You cant make people happy. You will die trying to come up to their marks and you ll end up losing your own identity. Losing your self to any other is like deing uselessly.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Adeel bin ahmed: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Its just a part of life , just a chapter , just a phase ; it is to be over and it will but i has …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, enlightment, inner-strength pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.

frase_original: Its just a part of life , just a chapter , just a phase ; it is to be over and it will but i has taught the harsh realities of life. In the end , your support lies in yourself. No one comes to rescue you , you have to gird up your loin against all the odds and you are to raise by your own. You cant make people happy. You will die trying to come up to their marks and you ll end up losing your own identity. Losing your self to any other is like deing uselessly.

texto: Keep your ideals with you and seek help from them. These are useless for me. Your shoe do not fit mine. I am done with the exhibitionist of yours. You are professing of something that is even worthless for you. You are so insecure and coward to accept the truth. Dnt make me as miserable as you are. Let me explore myself. Let me unlearn the lie this world has given to me . Let me just undo al the data which is being engraved on my mind. Let me be a child who is just born.
explicacao: Citação de Adeel bin ahmed sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Keep your ideals with you and seek help from them. These are useless for me. Your shoe do not fit…” articula reflexao, exploration, indifference em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como indifference e self.
